arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Fulham – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Newcastle United host Fulham in the Premier League this weekend in their first fixture of February. The fixture begins a crucial period for the Magpies, with important cup clashes and battles with Champions League rivals on the horizon. Newcastle eased to a 3-1 win at Southampton last weekend with Alexander Isak on target twice. The […] The post Newcastle vs Fulham – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Saudi move for Mo Salah will cause enormous problems for Newcastle
arts.sum: Although Mo Salah won’t leave Liverpool in this window he is expected to do so in the summer, and that could cause huge issues on Tyneside. Newcastle United’s owners, the Saudi Public Investment Fund (PIF), have a controlling interest in the top four sides in the Saudi Pro League and so have a vested interest […] The post Saudi move for Mo Salah will cause enormous problems for Newcastle appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United set for exciting wonderkid announcement before winter transfer window shuts
arts.sum: The Turkish club's general manager Ali Ekber Düzgün said: "Baran's transfer is left to the official signature. The Magpies were locked in talks with Turkish side Gençlerbirligi on Friday with the club's general manager admitting the deal is close.

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Fulham: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Newcastle take on Fulham in the Premier League on Saturday. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: Fulham transfer news: Cottagers want Roma attacker on loan deal following Harry Wilson injury
arts.sum: Fulham are reportedly keen to sign Roma attacker Matias Soule on a loan deal following the recent news of Harry Wilson's foot injury.

arts.ttl: Newcastle v Fulham: FPL team news + predicted line-ups

arts.ttl: Fulham Linked with Roma’s Matias Soulé
arts.sum: Fulham have set their sights on Roma's young Argentine striker, Matias Soulé. The 21-year-old, who joined Roma from Juventus last summer, has found playing time limited in the Italian capital this season. The post Fulham Linked with Roma’s Matias Soulé appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Shearer: Isak the 'assassin' will only get better
arts.sum: The Swedish striker, who only trails Mohamed Salah by two in the race for the Premier League Golden Boot, has been speaking about his objectives for the rest of the campaign - his third in English football - in an exclusive BBC Sport interview with Newcastle legend Alan Shearer . Isak's exploits this season include his header to defeat Arsenal at St James' Park, a moment that particularly delighted Shearer, the Premier League's all-time top scorer with 260 goals.

arts.ttl: Newcastle and Villa fined after mass confrontation
arts.sum: Aston Villa and Newcastle United are fined by the Football Association for their part in a mass confrontation during their Premier League game at St James' Park on 26 December.

arts.ttl: Alexander Isak's Newcastle United contract tease as he 'laughs' at Arsenal talk
arts.sum: Alexander Isak has teased 'we'll see' after Alan Shearer floated the prospect of the Newcastle United star signing a new long-term contract. You can see why Shearer mentioned seeing other 'big-name centre forwards sign long contracts' during an interview with Isak for the BBC after Erling Haaland put pen to paper on a staggering nine-year deal at Manchester City.
